name: Pumpkin Seeds
summary: Green kernels that are one of the most magnesium-dense foods around, and a strong source of zinc.

benefits.claim: One of the most magnesium-rich foods
benefits.mechanism: Pumpkin seeds are exceptionally high in magnesium — a mineral involved in hundreds of enzyme reactions, in muscle and nerve function, blood-pressure regulation, and building bone. Many people fall short of magnesium, so a handful of seeds is a dense top-up.

citations.title: Magnesium — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

benefits.mechanism: Pumpkin seeds are a good plant source of zinc, a mineral immune cells depend on and that the body also uses for wound healing, taste, and normal growth.

citations.title: Zinc — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

surprisingFacts.text: Pepitas — the hull-less green seeds — come from specific 'naked-seed' pumpkin varieties bred so the seeds grow without a tough white shell.

cautions.effect: Calorie-dense enough that large daily handfuls add up quickly, and a big jump in fibre and fat can unsettle your stomach. Nothing toxic at food amounts.
